phrases.text_local: Pode recomendar um restaurante típico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Sim, pode perguntar na bilheteira ou falar com o atendente do café para recomendações de restaurantes típicos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW fuh-LAHR KOHM AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO kuh-FEH PUH-ruh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can ask at the ticket desk or talk to the café attendant for recommendations of typical restaurants.

responses.english: Yes, you can ask at the ticket desk or talk to the café attendant for recommendations of typical restaurants.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW fuh-LAHR KOHM AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO kuh-FEH PUH-ruh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh.
responses.local: Sim, pode perguntar na bilheteira ou falar com o atendente do café para recomendações de restaurantes típicos.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde fica a consigna do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-jee een-dee-KAHR ON-jee FEE-kah ah-kohn-SEE-nyah doo-moo-ZEH-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Museums in Portugal typically offer free cloakroom services for coats and bags to preserve exhibits.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a consigna fica junto à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH koong-SEEG-nuh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, the cloakroom is located near the entrance.

responses.english: Good day, the cloakroom is located near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH koong-SEEG-nuh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a consigna fica junto à entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar um guia de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OONNG GEEUH DIH OW-deeoo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket desk, they can help.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket desk, they can help.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira, eles podem ajudar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café terrace counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do terraço do café?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO teh-RAH-soo DOO kuh-FEH?
phrases.cultural_note: The terrace offers panoramic views of the Cascais coastline and Sintra mountains.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Café da Casa das Histórias.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-FEH DUH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Café da Casa das Histórias.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Café da Casa das Histórias.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-FEH DUH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Café da Casa das Histórias.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop checkout is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o caixa da loja do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh DOO moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop and bookstore is a single area; checkout is at the counter.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Loja do Museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Museum Shop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Museum Shop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Loja do Museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop checkout is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o caixa da loja do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh DOO moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop specializes in books on Paula Rego's artwork and local crafts.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the café terrace counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do café no terraço?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO kuh-FEH NOO teh-RAH-soo?
phrases.cultural_note: The café terrace is on the iconic triangular windows terrace, a popular spot.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Café da Casa das Histórias. O balcão do terraço encontra-se aí.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-FEH DUH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh. AW bahl-KOWN DOO teh-RAH-soo ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH UHEE.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Café da Casa das Histórias. The terrace counter is there.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Café da Casa das Histórias. The terrace counter is there.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-FEH DUH KAH-zuh DUHSH eesh-TAW-reeuhsh. AW bahl-KOWN DOO teh-RAH-soo ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH UHEE.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Café da Casa das Histórias. O balcão do terraço encontra-se aí.

phrases.cultural_note: Cloakrooms are typically near the entrance; staff will direct you.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the triangular windows terrace is
phrases.text_local: Pode dizer onde está o terraço das janelas triangulares?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW teh-RAH-soo DUHSH zhuh-NEH-luhsh treeahnng-goo-LAH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Souto de Moura design features distinctive triangular windows framing Cascais views.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Terraço das Janelas Triangulares.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DUHSH zhuh-NEH-luhsh treeahnng-goo-LAH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow signs to the Triangular Windows Terrace.

responses.english: Follow signs to the Triangular Windows Terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DUHSH zhuh-NEH-luhsh treeahnng-goo-LAH-rihsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Terraço das Janelas Triangulares.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou na receção; eles podem fornecer um áudio-guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW NUH reh-sih-SOWN; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng foo-ruh-nih-SEHR OONNG OW-deeoo-GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket desk or reception; they can provide an audio guide.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket desk or reception; they can provide an audio guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW NUH reh-sih-SOWN; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng foo-ruh-nih-SEHR OONNG OW-deeoo-GEEUH.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou na receção; eles podem fornecer um áudio-guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent audio guides
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are common in museums; staff can assist at the entrance area.
